title: Viewer Workspace Map exposes repo links
summary: The viewer should render workspace package dependencies, route contracts, topic/event links, and cross-repo co-change pairs as Workspace Map rows in the Repo Intelligence cockpit, not only as summary counts.
body: The viewer should render workspace package dependencies, route contracts, topic/event links, and cross-repo co-change pairs as Workspace Map rows in the Repo Intelligence cockpit, not only as summary counts. Keep rows source-evidence based and do not try to focus local graph nodes for sibling-repo paths.

context.fact: The viewer should render workspace package dependencies, route contracts, topic/event links, and cross-repo co-change pairs as Workspace Map rows in the Repo Intelligence cockpit, not only as summary counts.
